item.title: Team Collaboration is Here
item.description:
We're excited to announce the launch of **Team Collaboration** — the most requested feature from our community.
## What's New
### Multi-User Workspaces - Invite up to 5 team members per workspace - Role-based permissions (Admin, Editor, Viewer) - Real-time collaboration with live cursors
### Activity Log Track every change in your workspace: - See who made what changes and when - Filter by user, action type, or date range - Export logs for compliance
### API Access Team plans now include f...

item.title: Three New Themes Available
item.description:
We've added three beautiful new themes to make your changelogs stand out even more.
## Meet the New Themes
### Minimal Clean, typography-focused design that puts your content first. Perfect for developer tools and API products.
### Cards Visual, card-based layout with subtle shadows and hover effects. Great for consumer SaaS products.
### Timeline Vertical timeline layout with accent dots and connecting lines. Ideal for products with frequent updates.
## How to Switch
1. Open your change...

item.title: Bug Fixes & Performance Improvements
item.description:
We've squashed some bugs and improved performance across the board.
## Fixed Issues
### RSS Feed Validation - Fixed invalid date formatting in RSS feeds - All feeds now pass W3C validation - Added proper `lastBuildDate` element
### Mobile Layout - Fixed horizontal scroll on small screens - Improved touch targets for navigation - Better font scaling on iOS devices
### Build Performance - Reduced build time by 40% - Better memory usage for large changelogs - Fixed memory leak in watch mode
...

item.title: Changelog.page is Live on Product Hunt!
item.description:
🎉 **We're live on Product Hunt!**
After 4 weeks of building, iterating, and testing with our beta users, we're thrilled to officially launch Changelog.page to the world.
## What We Built
Changelog.page is the beautiful, affordable changelog tool for SaaS founders. Unlike expensive widgets (Headway $29+, Beamer $49+), we generate static changelogs that:
- Load instantly on global CDN - Rank on Google (SEO-optimized) - Cost $15/mo instead of $50
## Launch Day Stats
In the first 24 hours: ...
